hooks.command: echo '--- JADWA Dev Environment ---' && python3 --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARNING: Python not found' && node --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARNING: Node.js not found' && (docker compose ps --format '{{.Name}} {{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'Docker services: not running (run: docker compose up postgres redis -d)')
